title: 151 Coatings Radiator Enamel 180ml White Gloss (388916)
features: Radiator Enamel White Gloss Paint - 180 ml

A heat resistant, low odour solvent based brilliant enamel white gloss paint that stays white and does not yellow with heat. Available in gloss finish. Not to be used on oil filled electric radiators.

Radiator Enamel is a topcoat paint which is used to paint radiators and pipes. It is specially formulated to provide a heat resistant finish on household water filled radiators and pipes and will provide a tough long lasting finish and will prevent rust.

Directions: The radiator surface should be clean and dry and free from dust, rust, oil and old loose paint. Where loose material is present, sand down with special sanding block or paper. Ensure radiator is turned off whilst painting. Using a clean soft brush simply apply a single coat to the surface to be painted.
Can be used for touching up fridges and white appliances.
